meta.name: Glam Cosmetics
meta.description: A high-contrast, edgy beauty and cosmetics e-commerce store. It blends dark, dramatic themes with vibrant, high-saturation product imagery. The aesthetic is bold, slightly brutalist in its typographic choices, and heavily relies on striking, editorial-style photography.

fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

header.notes: Header overlays the hero image. It has a transparent background gradient fading to dark at the top. Logo on the far left, main nav centered, account/cart/search links on the right as text. An announcement bar sits above the main header.

footer.description: Newsletter signup section prominently displayed on the left side of the footer with a stark pink CTA button.
footer.notes: Dark footer with a large newsletter signup area on the left and 4 columns of links on the right. Bottom bar contains copyright and legal links with the logo.

productCard.notes: Product cards have a very clean, clinical look with stark white backgrounds, fine grey borders, and crisp, high-saturation product cutouts. Typography is small, uppercase, and sans-serif for titles. Pricing is displayed below the title, often showing strikethrough for sales. Some cards feature tiny vertical text indicating shade options. Purple starburst badges are used for bundle discounts.

productGrid.notes: The grids act as carousels with left/right arrows outside the grid container. Cards butt up against each other with only a 1px grey border separating them, creating a unified, seamless grid block.

featuredProducts.label: Collection Label
featuredProducts.heading: Section Heading
featuredProducts.notes: Headings are prominent, using a mix of a lighter serif font and a bold sans-serif or varying weights of serif. E.g., '30% OFF VELOUR ICONS'. A 'SHOP NOW' or 'SHOP COLLECTION' link is aligned right opposite the heading.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.layout: Full width, centered text, close button on left, arrow on right.

design.styling: Thin bar at the very top of the page.

content.headline: Promotional flash deal announcement with percentage discount and link.
content.specialElements: Promotional text with a specific discount.

sections.name: header
sections.layout: Flexbox row, logo far left, main nav center, secondary links far right.

design.background: Transparent, sits over the hero image gradient.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-bleed background image, text aligned to the right.

design.background: Full-bleed high-quality product lifestyle image (skincare splash).
design.text: White text, combining sans-serif for subheadings and large serif for the main headline.
design.styling: Dark gradient overlay at top for header legibility.

content.headline: Large aspirational product collection announcement.
content.cta: Single white square button with black text.

media.description: Dynamic splash photography of skincare products in icy blue water.

sections.name: category-circles
sections.layout: Horizontal scrolling row of circular items.

design.text: Small white uppercase text below each circle.
design.styling: Circles are tightly packed with minimal gaps.

media.description: Circular cutouts of various product collections or editorial shots.

sections.name: promotional-product-grid
sections.layout: Container with heading left, link right, followed by a 4-5 column carousel grid.

design.text: Dark foreground. Heading mixes serif and sans-serif.

content.headline: Promotional category heading indicating a discount.

media.description: Brightly colored makeup products on stark white backgrounds.

sections.name: new-collection-grid
sections.layout: Container with heading left, link right, followed by a 4-5 column carousel grid.

content.headline: New arrival collection heading.

media.description: New makeup palettes and accessories on white backgrounds.

content.specialElements: A floating 'CLAIM DISCOUNT' button appears overlaid on the left side of this section.

sections.name: restocked-grid
sections.layout: Container with heading left, link right, followed by a 4-5 column carousel grid.

sections.name: latest-release-grid
sections.layout: Container with heading left, link right, followed by a 4-5 column carousel grid.

media.description: Icy blue and pink skincare products.

design.styling: No gaps between the three large images.

media.description: Three dramatic, high-fashion editorial portraits showing different makeup looks.

content.specialElements: Text overlays in the top-left corner of each image acting as titles for the looks/collections.

sections.name: bundle-offers-grid
sections.layout: Container with heading left, link right, followed by a 4-5 column carousel grid.

content.headline: Bundle and save promotional heading.

sections.name: footer
sections.layout: Split layout: Newsletter left, 4 column links right.

content.headline: Newsletter signup heading.
content.body: Short prompt to receive latest news.
content.cta: Single bright pink square button for newsletter submission.
